items.name_en: P🆕【Premium Original】🔥【Exclusive Background】🌈Elephant Print
items.name_cn:
P🆕【Premium Original】🔥【Exclusive Background】🌈Elephant Print
New Elephant Print NIKai Front Flap Bag, accented with metal LE CASSANDRE, featuring convertible leather and chain shoulder straps. The popular NIKI Elephant Print is a favorite among many stars and influencers, hard to find in stores. The globally popular NIKI features a large capacity and elephant print cowhide! The craftsmanship is very complex, offering you a unique visual effect! An absolute must-have style!👑
Model: 633178
Size: 28X20X8.5cm

items.name_en: Premium Exclusive🔥 Grey/Antique Gold
items.name_cn:
Premium Exclusive🔥 Grey/Antique Gold
▪ROSE▪️ Autumn/Winter New, Korean Celebrity Style Hobo!! This year's exploding hot shoulder bag Y's arrival!! The bag body has a simple, three-dimensional outline, looking structured but not too sharp. Paired with the brand's signature insert buckle, it gives a unique temperament that is both classic and elegant, yet very fashionable and modern👍
Model: 713938【Original Leather】
Size: 22x22x10cm

items.name_cn:
Purple Lizard Print · 22cm
The most elegant accordion bag series sac de jour, a timeless classic. Exquisite glossy calfskin with a full luster, very noble! The strap is adjustable, choose the length yourself! The logo is very small, perfectly interpreting the style of understated luxury~
Model: 717440
Size: 22x18x10.5cm
